title: MCCW
description: Create & Aeronautics survival, mods, fair play!
body:
![MCCW logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46ecbd9f1910545039f9453f5aaa1c2e253dade3.png)

## Welcome to MCCW

**MCCW** is a **modded Minecraft survival server** focused on **Create**, **automation**, **building**, and long-term world progression.

This server was **built and configured from the ground up**, with a custom mod setup that includes **Create** and **Aeronautics**. creating a unique survival experience that goes beyond standard gameplay.

Whether you enjoy building large bases, creating automated systems, designing factories, or exploring a modded world, **MCCW** is made for players who want a more creative and technical Minecraft experience.

## Server Features

- **Modded Survival**
- **Create Mod**
- **Create Aeronautics**
- **Automation & Machines**
- **Custom Builds**
- **Technical Progression**
- **Player Economy Potential**
- **Long-Term Survival World**

## What Makes MCCW Different

MCCW is not just another random modded server.

The server setup, modpack structure, and overall experience were **put together manually** to create a smoother and more enjoyable survival environment.

The goal is to build a world where players can:

- create **factories**
- build **storage systems**
- automate **farms**
- design **train networks**
- expand **bases and cities**
- work on large **technical and decorative projects**

If you enjoy **Create-based survival**, engineering, progression, and building something meaningful over time, **MCCW** is the right place.

---

# Server Rules

## General Rules

1. Be respectful to all members. No harassment, hate speech, or bullying.
2. No spamming, flooding, or excessive caps.
3. Keep conversations appropriate. No NSFW content.
4. Follow Discord's Terms of Service at all times.
5. Use channels for their intended purpose.

## Minecraft Server Rules

6. No griefing or destroying other players' builds.
7. No hacking, cheating, or using unfair mods such as X-ray or aimbot.
8. Respect land claims and property.
9. No exploiting bugs or glitches.
10. Keep builds appropriate. No offensive content.
11. No bug abuse, including TNT duping.

## Chat Rules

12. No advertising without permission.
13. No excessive toxicity or drama.
14. Do not impersonate staff or other players.
15. Keep language appropriate. Swearing is allowed only in moderation.

## Staff & Punishments

16. Listen to staff members at all times.
17. Punishments may include warnings, mutes, kicks, or bans.
18. Attempting to bypass punishments will result in stricter action.

## Fair Play

19. Play fair and do not ruin others' experience.
20. No scamming or stealing items.
21. Report rule breakers to staff instead of arguing.

---

## Agreement

By staying in this server, you agree to follow these rules.
